content.body: We’ve got Aki and ZB on the agenda today.

CRA annex 1: https://expertzebra.com/cra/#d1e38-68-1
email me your questions, **especially** if you think I should answer them at full plenary. The CRA is big and I want to provide a somewhat focused overview for TC39 if I'm going to take up their time
aki.braun@ecma-international.org
